drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T2(f0 == "a", f1 == true)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f2 != true, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), 1.0));
    insert(new T2("a", $p1_0.isF2()));
end
rule "R2"
salience -1
no-loop
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f0 < -2.0, $b2_0_0 : f1)
    T1(f1 < 1.5, f0 >= 6.0, $b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f1)
    T0($b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f1 <= 7, $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T1($p3_0.getF0(), $p3_0.getF1()));
    $p3_0.setF2(true);
    $p3_0.setF0($b3_0_1);
    update($p3_0);
end
name: fz_123_8168
